description: 全8種目のアンダードッグ勝利・予測外れの要因分析。第一段階の精度向上と第二段階（逆転予測）への橋渡しデータ。

framework.phase1: 強い側が確実に勝つことを読み取る精度向上（現在）
framework.phase2: アンダードッグが逆転する条件パターンの特定
framework.phase3: 勝者を正しく予測する（どちらが勝つかを当てる）

upset_tiers.GO: 通常のGO推奨（確信度≥75%、強い側を支持）
upset_tiers.CAUTION: GO未満だが一応追跡（確信度60-74%）
upset_tiers.GAMBLE_BET: 通常基準外。アンダードッグ有利の特殊条件が揃う場合の別枠。別stake管理（通常の1/3以下推奨）

共通.UF01: コート・表面・環境の適性差（クレー嫌い、屋内/屋外、人工芝/天然芝 等）
共通.UF02: 勢いのある若手・ホットストリーク（市場評価が実力に追いついていない）
共通.UF03: 実力指標差がボーダーライン（差が小さく逆転が起きやすい）
共通.UF04: 本命側の体力消耗・連戦疲労（前戦延長/overtime/連日試合等）
共通.UF05: スタイルミスマッチ（攻撃型が守備型を崩す、またはその逆）
共通.UF06: 本命側のモチベーション低下・メンタル要因（消化試合、プレッシャー過多等）
共通.UF07: ホームコート/ホームゲームアドバンテージの過小評価
共通.UF08: 怪我・体調不良・出場停止の事前未把握
共通.UF09: 市場オッズが実力差を過大評価（名声バイアス・ランキング依存）

テニス固有.UFT01: H2H（直接対決）での相性が極端に悪い（クレーでのH2H等）
テニス固有.UFT02: 第一セット落とした後の精神的崩壊（特定選手のパターン）
テニス固有.UFT03: ワイルドカード・地元選手のホームコートアドバンテージ（観客の声援）

NHL固有.UFH01: バックトゥバック（連日試合）でのゴーリー疲弊
NHL固有.UFH02: ホットゴーリー（直近sv%が異常に高い）
NHL固有.UFH03: パワープレー/ペナルティキルの当日マッチアップ
NHL固有.UFH04: プレーオフレース終盤のモチベーション差（バブル外チームの諦め）

NRL固有.UFN01: 主力FW/ハーフ欠場（スクラム・プレイメイカー）
NRL固有.UFN02: 中立地・長距離移動の影響
NRL固有.UFN03: 雨天・重いグラウンド（フィジカル系チームに有利）

SuperRugby固有.UFR01: 国際デューティ（代表選手の疲弊・抜け）
SuperRugby固有.UFR02: フィジー・モアナパシフィカの気候適応有利
SuperRugby固有.UFR03: ラインアウト・スクラムの特殊戦略が機能した場合

UFL固有.UFU01: QB交代・先発変更の直前情報未反映
UFL固有.UFU02: リーグ創設期のサンプル不足（各チームの実力評価が不安定）

NRL/SuperRugby共通.UFG01: 審判・反則傾向のマッチアップ（ペナルティ数が多いチームへの不利）

factor_notes.UF01: Medvedevはクレーを明確に苦手（後にR008として規則化）。Berrettiniはクレー得意のイタリア人
factor_notes.UF09: 市場はランキング(7)で評価。クレー適性を過小評価していた

confirmed_upsets.learning: 強さ指標差200ptあっても表面適性が逆転する場合がある

factor_notes.UF03: cElo差130ptはボーダーライン。実力差が小さかった
factor_notes.UF05: Machacのアグレッシブサーブ・フラットがCerundoloのクレーベースラインゲームを崩壊

confirmed_upsets.learning: クレーでアグレッシブサーブ系がベースライナーを崩せる

factor_notes.UF02: Fonseca 19歳、今大会で初のMasters R16。勢いが市場に反映されていなかった
factor_notes.UF03: cElo差40ptは極めて小さい。実質同格以上

confirmed_upsets.learning: cElo差が50pt未満は事実上同格。若手のホットストリークは要注意
confirmed_upsets.rule_created: R012 (rules_tennis.json v2.1: 若手ホットストリーク警戒)

factor_notes.UF03_variant: L1差17.3ptは大きく見えるが、サンプル5試合のPDは脆弱。Raiders総失点-69点のうち、単一試合での大量失点（アウトライヤー）が平均を-13.8まで引き下げた可能性が高い。真の実力差は5〜10pt程度かもしれない
factor_notes.UF06_variant: 1-4のRaidersは背水の陣状態。崖っぷちチームが高いモチベーションで全力プレーする傾向（NRL文化での『desperate team effect』）は分析で考慮されていなかった
factor_notes.UFN_new: NRL小サンプル問題: R1〜R8はPD/試合の分散が大きく（6〜8試合で1〜2試合の大敗が全体平均を5〜10pt歪める）、PDベースのL1指標が過大評価になりやすい。R3〜R8の信頼度上限を70%にキャップすべきだった

confirmed_upsets.confidence_post_analysis: 適正は65〜68%（小サンプル補正後）
confirmed_upsets.miss_layer: L1過信（小サンプル期PD歪み）
confirmed_upsets.learning: NRL R3〜R8はPDが5試合以下のサンプルに基づく。単一試合アウトライヤーが-5〜10pt/試合の歪みを生む。この時期の信頼度上限は70%が適切。78%まで上げるには10試合以上の実績が必要。
confirmed_upsets.rule_created: R011（崖っぷちチーム補正 -5%）、R012（早期シーズン小サンプル補正 信頼度上限70%）→ rules_nrl.json v1.1 に追記済
confirmed_upsets.rule_linked: P020 (NRL small-sample PD unreliability - NEW candidate)

factor_notes.UF04: Bublik MC直後(Alcaraz 6-3 6-0敗退 = 4/10) → Munich R1 4/14 = 4日間のみ休養。MC→Munich B2B参戦(クロスツアー移動)。2大会連続の精神的・肉体的消耗。Bublikのゲームはドロップショット・トリックショット多用のハイリスク型—疲弊時は集中力が落ちてミスが増える傾向。
factor_notes.UF06: Bublikは第2セットでMolcanのサーブに全くプレッシャーをかけられず(3pts lost)。精神的なフラットな状態—MC大敗後の切り替え困難もモチベーション要因。Molcanは対照的にMunichがシーズン初戦(フレッシュ)、クレーbaseline型でBublikのトリック系に対応しやすいスタイル。

confirmed_upsets.analysis_note: 我々のモデル: Bublik信頼度65.5%(MC疲弊-3%補正済)→R010でSKIP・EV-12.4%。SKIP判断は正しかった。ただし実際の差はさらに大きかった(Molcan完勝)。疲弊補正-3%では不足—実際の影響は-10%相当だった可能性。【学習ポイント】主要大会(Masters/GS)直後の500/250ではB2B上位シード選手の疲弊リスクを-3%ではなく-6%〜-10%に引き上げる必要がある。特にMasters→250/500の翌週は最も疲弊リスクが高い。既存ルールR005/R006の B2B補正を大会間疲弊にも拡張すべき（ルール候補P006）。
confirmed_upsets.learning: Masters→次週500/250直行選手の疲弊補正は-3%では不足。主要大会でQF以降まで勝ち残った選手（3-4試合消化）の翌週は-6%〜-10%が妥当。MolcanのようなフレッシュなベースライナーがBublik型トリック選手に勝てる条件が揃っていた。
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: P006: Masters→翌週大会 B2B疲弊補正強化（QF以降まで勝ち残り→翌週-6~-10%）

confirmed_upsets.favorite: Paolini J.(4) - WTA7位・2025年ローマ優勝・全仏準優勝
confirmed_upsets.strength_diff_metric: cElo差: 推定200pt+(Paolini clay cElo高値 vs Sonmez qualifier水準)

factor_notes.L3_FormSlump: Paolini 2026年成績: 8勝7敗(53%)、世界20位圏外に6敗。「completely out of form in singles in 2026」(tennisnerd.net評)。cEloは2025年ピーク（ローマ優勝・全仏準優勝）を反映しており2026年現在の実力より過大評価。2025年クレー獲得ポイントの防衛プレッシャー（ランキングポイント3,907→減少中）が影響か。cEloの形式スランプ反映ラグが今回のモデル失敗の最大原因。
factor_notes.L2_ServeReturn: Paolini 2ndサーブポイント獲得率37.5%(9/24)という壊滅的数字。1stサーブ率57.1%(ATPより低いWTA水準でも低め)→2ndサーブが24本多発。SonmezはPaoliniの2ndサーブを徹底的に攻撃。BP12本創出しながら4本しか決めない(33.3%)は精神的崩壊のシグナル。対照的にSonmezは自身の2ndサーブも73.3%獲得—Paoliniのリターン攻撃を封じた。
factor_notes.UF01: Stuttgart indoor clay（速い表面）でSonmezのアグレッシブフラット攻撃が機能。第2セットでSonmez 1stサーブ率83.3%(20/24)→完全支配。Paoliniのヘビートップスピンはindoor clay速バウンドで効果が半減。W007 indoor clay効果が再度確認された（Ostapenko,Korpatsch,Eala,Sonmezで4例目）。

confirmed_upsets.analysis_note: 最大の学習: cEloは前年度の大活躍を反映するため「ディフェンディングチャンピオン型スランプ」を捉えられない。Paoliniのように前年クレーで大活躍した選手が翌年同大会に来るとき、ポイント防衛プレッシャー+フォーム低下のダブル効果でcElo過大評価になりやすい。当季勝率が53%の選手をcEloだけで「77%信頼度GO」にしたことが根本的ミス。L3にシーズンフォームスランプ検出項目が必要（P007候補として追加）。
confirmed_upsets.learning: WTA GOで高信頼度候補をスクリーニングする際、当該選手の今季勝率も必ずチェックする。60%未満の場合は-10%補正適用。特に前年クレー主要タイトル保持者は翌年同大会で「ポイント防衛プレッシャー」型スランプに注意。
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: P007: シーズンフォームスランプ補正（当季勝率<60%のランキング上位選手に-10%）

confirmed_upsets.pattern: Protected Ranking選手が完全回復済み。PR=弱体化という前提を完全否定。Hurkacz 81%/71% serve pts won、0 BPs faced、UE14 vs Marozsan UE33。H2H Hurkacz 2-0も無視。

confirmed_upsets.match: South Sydney Rabbitohs vs Canberra Raiders
confirmed_upsets.pattern: 崖っぷちチーム(1-4)が前半24-4で圧倒。小サンプルPD/G(-13.8/G)が実態を反映していなかった。中立地Perth開催でRabbitohs移動疲弊。デスパレートエフェクトは統計外。
confirmed_upsets.rule_linked: P020 (NRL small-sample PD - DUPLICATE ENTRY with U005 - same match)
confirmed_upsets.duplicate_note: same match as U005 (Raiders 36-34 Rabbitohs R6). Deprecated in favor of U005.

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。
confirmed_upsets.our_verdict: SKIP (L1 cElo差未確認: Badosa怪我でcElo信頼性低)

match_stats.note: Stats from WTA page (partial). Score 2-6 7-5 6-4 confirmed by Tennis Tonic/Tennis.com/WTA video.

factor_notes.UF07: Lys WC (German home player in Stuttgart). Home crowd advantage. Court/conditions familiarity.
factor_notes.UF08: Badosa ranked #106 at match time due to extended injury (season of inconsistency: R32 Charleston, R1 Linz). Market priced her at 1.32 (76% implied) based on pre-injury peak reputation. Badosa 15 DFs reflects poor physical condition post-comeback. SOURCE CONFIRMED: puntodebreak.com 'Badosa also fails to surpass the debut in Stuttgart'. tennis.com: 'Eva Lys battles past Paula Badosa to end losing skid' - Lys herself was also on a losing run, making this a form-uncertain matchup for both.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was correct (no bet). But: when former top-10 returns from injury at #102, market over-prices based on name. L1 was unverifiable (Badosa injury) = correct outcome. Signal for future: injury comeback player at rank 100+ vs home WC = upset flag.
confirmed_upsets.what_signal_could_detect: Pre-match signal: player's current ranking >40 positions below 52-week high rank → injury comeback discount. Home WC + opponent injury comeback = elevated upset probability.
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: P009: Injury comeback player discount. If favorite's rank > 40 spots below 52-week peak, apply -10% to market implied probability.
confirmed_upsets.learning: Market over-values big-name returning injury players based on reputation (not current fitness). Our cElo was correctly marked as unverifiable. Type A: home WC + opponent injury comeback is a detectable pre-match upset signal.
sources: puntodebreak.com: Badosa also fails to surpass the debut in Stuttgart (2026-04-14)
tennis.com: Eva Lys battles past Paula Badosa to end losing skid (Stuttgart Highlights)
WTA Official score page: Lys vs. Badosa Round of 32 Porsche Tennis Grand Prix 2026

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。
confirmed_upsets.our_verdict: SKIP (N016発動: CAR選手休養でゴーリー変更→GO基準外)

factor_notes.UFH04: CAR was resting key players (N016: seeding secured, motivated to rest for PO). CRITICAL NEW CONTEXT: PHI was playing for a PLAYOFF CLINCHER (first berth since 2020). PHI had maximum motivational asymmetry vs CAR's rest management. Score 3-2 SO — Matvei Michkov + Trevor Zegras scored for PHI; PHI clinched East playoff spot. CAR still got the loser point needed to secure East top seed — both teams got what they needed.
factor_notes.UF06: CAR had motivation reduction (playoff spot secured, resting for PO). PHI played with full intensity as underdog.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was correct (N016発動). Result validates that N016 lineup-rest rule correctly removes false GO candidates. PHI SO win shows how effective rest-team lineup is reduced.
sources: nhl.com: Flyers clinch playoff spot with shootout win against Hurricanes (2026-04-13)
espn.com: Flyers 3-2 Hurricanes Final Score
washingtonpost.com: Flyers beat East top seed Hurricanes 3-2 in SO and secure first playoff berth since 2020

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。
confirmed_upsets.match: St. Louis Blues vs Minnesota Wild

factor_notes.UF06: STL came back from 3-1 deficit with 5 unanswered goals — maximum intensity at home. MIN had secured playoff position; motivation reduced relative to STL's desperate home rally. NHL.com headline: 'Blues score 5 unanswered goals, rally past Wild'. Buchnevich scored 200th NHL career goal (personal milestone motivation). Joel Hofer made 28 saves (hot goalie). Result: 6-3 STL comeback win confirms R001 xGF% advantage alone does not capture game-day intensity asymmetry.
factor_notes.UFH04: MIN had secured playoff position; motivation reduced relative to STL's fight-or-die posture.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was appropriate. STL 6-3 dominant win shows how RS-end motivation asymmetry can produce outsized upsets. xGF% alone doesn't capture game-day intensity.
sources: nhl.com: Blues score 5 unanswered goals, rally past Wild (2026-04-13)
espn.com: Blues 6-3 Wild Final Score
cbssports.com: Minnesota Wild vs. St. Louis Blues Game Recap April 13 2026
confirmed_upsets.rule_linked: N016 (seeding_secured_rest_implemented) + UFH04 general fatigue motivation pattern

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。

factor_notes.UFT03: CORRECTION: Vacherot became first player from Monaco to reach Monte-Carlo Masters SEMI-FINAL in Open Era (not just QF - tennismajors.com: 'Vacherot stuns de Minaur to become the first Monegasque in a Monte-Carlo Masters semifinal'; ATP Tour: 'Home hope Vacherot downs De Minaur for fairytale SF spot in Monte-Carlo'). Full path to QF: beat Musetti (4th seed, R2) + Hurkacz (R3) before de Minaur - two top-10 home wins. ATP Tour: Vacherot saved 13 BPs en route to Monte-Carlo SFs. Maximum home crowd with Monaco prince in attendance.
factor_notes.UF07: Full home advantage: crowd, familiarity, conditions, mental freedom of the underdog with nothing to lose.
factor_notes.UF02: Vacherot on hot streak: R32 d. Hurkacz(PR) — our model correctly predicted this HIT (GO @1.57 +0.57u). QF momentum carry is a real effect.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was technically correct (R010). But our R16 prediction was Vacherot GO and HIT. Pattern: when a WC home player has already beaten a seeded player in prior round, their next-round confidence should carry a +5% momentum bonus.
confirmed_upsets.what_signal_could_detect: WC home player who beat seeded opponent in prior round: +5% momentum bonus → moves 70% → 75% = right at GO threshold. Would have caught this.
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: P010: WC home player consecutive round momentum bonus +5%. If WC home beat seeded player in previous round, increase next-round confidence by 5%.
confirmed_upsets.learning: MC2026 QF upset validates home crowd + hot-streak compounding. Model correctly had Vacherot as GO in R16 — the same logic should carry to QF.
sources: tennismajors.com: Vacherot stuns de Minaur to become the first Monegasque in a Monte-Carlo Masters semifinal
atptour.com: Vacherot continues historic run, saves 13 BPs en route to Monte-Carlo SFs
atptour.com: Home hope Vacherot downs De Minaur for fairytale SF spot in Monte-Carlo (highlights)

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。

factor_notes.UF02: Shapovalov returning to form — aggressive serve/forehand combo on clay. Market undervalued comeback potential at cElo 1728.
factor_notes.UF05: Shapovalov's flat/serve-centric style vs Griekspoor's clay baseline game created mismatch.
factor_notes.UF03: cElo差45pt is well within noise band. Effectively same level match — 50/50 at best.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was correct (L1未達). Result confirms cElo差<50pt matches are genuinely unpredictable. No issue with SKIP decision.

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。
confirmed_upsets.our_verdict: SKIP (Tsitsipas conf 68% after MC R1 loss -5% adjustment, R010 applied)

factor_notes.UF06: SOURCE VERIFIED: puntodebreak.com HEADLINE (Munich match): 'Tsitsipas hits rock bottom with a new defeat' - media characterization of Munich loss, not a direct Tsitsipas quote. Confirmed Tsitsipas post-Munich quote: 'I accept my current position, understanding that this is part of the process.' (tennisuptodate.com). KEY CONTEXT: Tsitsipas made deliberate schedule SWITCH from Barcelona to Munich (tennis365.com: 'Tsitsipas Munich switch backfires as rankings slide continues'). Ranking set to fall outside Top 75. MATCH NOTE: Match was suspended mid-way and completed next morning (tennisuptodate.com). MC R1 loss to Cerundolo = first-ever R1 exit at MC (22-4 prior record); Munich continued downward spiral.
factor_notes.UF01: Marozsan is a clay baseline specialist (Hungarian). His style well-suited to Munich outdoor clay even vs Tsitsipas.
factor_notes.UF04: MC (Monaco) → Munich cross-tournament travel. Physical and mental depletion post-MC disaster.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was correct — the -5% MC form adjustment was the key insight that caught this match. Marozsan win in 3 sets (TB in 2nd set) validates mental fragility of Tsitsipas at this stage.
confirmed_upsets.what_signal_could_detect: Career-worst tournament result (first-ever R1 exit after 20+ appearance history) triggers -10% mental penalty, not just -5%.
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: P011: Career-worst tournament result (first-ever R1 exit at event with 20+ prior appearances) triggers -10% mental penalty instead of standard -5% form adjustment.
confirmed_upsets.learning: Our model correctly SKIP'd this match via R010 + form adjustment. Validates the MC-form-slump rule chain.
sources: puntodebreak.com: Tsitsipas hits rock bottom with a new defeat (2026-04-15)
tennisuptodate.com: I accept my current position - Tsitsipas faces restart after Munich match suspension
tennis365.com: Tsitsipas Munich switch backfires as rankings slide continues
cypress-mail.com: Tsitsipas Munich switch backfires as rankings slide continues

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。
confirmed_upsets.match: Melbourne Storm vs New Zealand Warriors
confirmed_upsets.our_verdict: SKIP (screening_log R6: Storm/Warriors SKIP。PDG差が閾値以下か他優先試合あり)

factor_notes.UF02: Warriors ended a 17-game H2H losing streak specifically against Melbourne Storm - NOT a general season losing streak. First Warriors win in Melbourne in 12 years. SOURCE: newswire.co.nz: 'Warriors End 12-Year Melbourne Hoodoo with Dominant 38-14 Demolition of Storm'. ESPN: 'Warriors rock Storm to serve up fourth straight loss' (Storm 4th consecutive loss). Coach Webster revealed deliberate 'themed build-up' to break streak: 'We wanted to change history' (sportnation.nz). HT: Warriors 18-14 Storm - then 3 tries in first 11 min after restart turned it to 36-14 blowout.
factor_notes.UF07: Warriors home advantage (NZ or home venue). Storm travelled for away game.
factor_notes.UF06: Storm had secured playoff contention — intensity potentially lower than Warriors' desperation to end the streak.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: 38-14 final margin is enormous. Losing-streak-ending effect is systematically under-modeled. Even if SKIP was correct, this warrants a new NRL rule candidate.
confirmed_upsets.what_signal_could_detect: Team attempting to end a 10+ game losing streak has significant elevated motivation. Flag opponent team as reduced-confidence target.
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: NRL_R_new2: Extreme losing streak (10+ games) = opponent motivation penalty -8%. Apply to team they are facing.
sources: newswire.co.nz: Warriors End 12-Year Melbourne Hoodoo with Dominant 38-14 Demolition of Storm (2026-04-11)
espn.com: Warriors rock Storm to serve up fourth straight loss (NRL Round 6 report)
sportnation.nz: We wanted to change history - Webster reveals Warriors themed build-up
nrl.com: Storm v Warriors Round 6 2026 match centre

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。
confirmed_upsets.our_verdict: SKIP (conf 65% < threshold or Sharks L1 advantage but below GO confidence)

factor_notes.UF03: Early NRL season (R6) small sample PD. Sharks PD advantage overstated by outlier games in first 5 rounds.
factor_notes.UF07: CORRECTION: Game was played at OPTUS STADIUM PERTH — NEUTRAL venue for both Sydney teams (previously incorrectly noted as Roosters home at Allianz Stadium). Roosters came back from 22-6 deficit at a neutral Perth ground. Sharks may have had slight Perth crowd advantage (popular travel destination for Sharks fans). Roosters' comeback at neutral/away venue is even more impressive than initially noted.
factor_notes.UFN_new: Same small-sample NRL factor as U005: R6 PDG less reliable than R12+ data. Sharks PD inflated by early-season outlier results.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was appropriate. 34-22 comeback from 22-6 shows Roosters outperformed despite playing at neutral venue in Perth (not home). CORRECTION: UF07 home advantage was misidentified. The actual NRL small-sample factor (UFN_new/R012) was the primary driver. Game pattern: Sharks dominated first half 22-12, Roosters swept second half. 'Game of two halves' validates R012 (small sample PDG unreliable early season).
sources: nrl.com: Sharks v Roosters Round 6 2026 match centre
leagueunlimited.com: Red-hot Roosters stun Sharks in big comeback
zerotackle.com: Sharks vs Roosters Round 6 2026 live scores and stats
confirmed_upsets.rule_linked: P020 (NRL small-sample PD unreliability - same pattern as U005)

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。
confirmed_upsets.our_verdict: SKIP (Louisville conf 75% = at threshold, SKIP decision)

factor_notes.UF03: conf 75% right at threshold. L1 diff was borderline. Storm was genuinely competitive, not a clear underdog.
factor_notes.UFU02: UFL W3: only 3 games of sample per team. Storm 3-0 (2nd OT win of season already), Louisville 0-3. IMPORTANT: OT result was CONTROVERSIAL — Storm won via UFL's unique 2-point OT rule (2nd defensive foul by same team = automatic successful try for offense). Louisville OUTGAINED Storm 449-323 in total yards but lost due to the rule quirk. thegruelingtruth.com: 'Storm Stay Perfect, Kings Stay Winless — Orlando Escapes Louisville in Controversial OT Thriller'. This adds a new factor: UFL overtime rule specifics create variance beyond pure team quality.
factor_notes.UF04: OT result (29-27 = 2pt) confirms these teams were essentially equal on the day.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was correct. OT result validates borderline confidence — when conf is 74-76% in early UFL season, SKIP is appropriate. Pattern: early UFL season games at 75% conf are effectively 60-65% real probability.
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: UFU_R_new: UFL early season (W1-W6) effective confidence cap of 70% (apply -5% to all UFL predictions until W7+). Accounts for small sample instability. NOTE: A009 OT controversy also suggests UFL overtime format is a unique variance factor — OT games should be flagged with additional caution.
sources: foxsports.com: Orlando Storm vs. Louisville Kings Final Score April 10 2026 (box score)
thegruelingtruth.com: Storm Stay Perfect — Orlando Escapes Louisville in Controversial OT Thriller
yahoo.com: Louisville Kings fall to Orlando Storm on bizarre UFL overtime rule
uflnewshub.com: UFL Scores Today Orlando Storm 29 Louisville Kings 27 OT
confirmed_upsets.rule_linked: U008_modified (UFL W3-6 small-sample cap IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-16) - evidence key case

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。
confirmed_upsets.match: St. Louis Battlehawks vs Birmingham Stallions
confirmed_upsets.our_verdict: SKIP (L1差5pt weak, borderline or below 4pt/G threshold note)

factor_notes.UF03: L1 PD差5pt is borderline. Effectively equal teams. Close result (4pt) confirms this.
factor_notes.UF07: St. Louis HOME game at The Dome at America's Center — attendance 20,209, one of strongest UFL home crowd environments (oursportscentral.com). 21-POINT 4th quarter comeback by Battlehawks (Harrison Frost: 3 TD passes in Q4; Hakeem Butler: 4 rec 146 yds inc 64-yd TD). Home crowd effect was clearly a factor — Battlehawks came back from 10-point deficit TWICE. Confirms that STL home advantage (+3% candidate) is real and should be considered.
factor_notes.UFU02: Birmingham Stallions' historical USFL dominance (prior dynasty) may have inflated market expectations. But Stallions showed genuine competitiveness (led for most of the game). 21-point Battlehawks Q4 comeback is statistically rare — confirms borderline L1 + home crowd can flip games in late stages. Final: 34-30 (4-pt margin validates borderline L1 call).

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was correct — borderline L1 diff was appropriately excluded. Home advantage (UF07) in UFL appears meaningful for St. Louis specifically.
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: Consider adding STL home advantage credit (+3%) to UFL screening given their strong fanbase/home record.
sources: oursportscentral.com: Battlehawks Rally to Defeat Stallions in Thrilling 34-30 Victory
fox2now.com: Battlehawks edge Stallions in dramatic 34-30 comeback win
foxsports.com: Birmingham Stallions vs St. Louis Battlehawks Final Score April 12 2026
confirmed_upsets.rule_linked: U008_modified (UFL W3-6 small-sample cap) + D-observation for STL home venue +3% candidate

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPした試合で発生したアップセット。スクリーニング閾値・判断の妥当性検証用。

factor_notes.UF03: cElo gap 82pt borderline. BUT Carabelli arrived with exceptional 2026 clay form: 10-4 on clay, WON Rosario Challenger, reached Marrakech SF (Source: PB Tennis X / ATP Stats Centre). This was Carabelli's FIRST career win vs Top 20 player (after 10 previous losses vs Top 20). Khachanov ALSO lost MC R1 (to Arthur Rinderknech) - entered Barcelona with back-to-back early exits. Result: 6-3 6-4 in 74 minutes - Khachanov given ZERO break point opportunities.
factor_notes.UF01: Carabelli from Argentina (clay specialist). Khachanov primarily hard court player. In 2026, Carabelli 10-4 on clay (eleco.com.ar confirmed: 'Carabelli dio el golpe en Barcelona y elimino a Khachanov'). Completely dominant performance - no BPs faced. SCORE NOTE: Spanish sources (eleco.com.ar) show 6-3 6-4; our record shows 6-4 6-3 - possible set-order discrepancy, verify via ATP stats centre.
factor_notes.UF02: Carabelli on home continent (South American clay specialist). Lower-ranked players with strong clay pedigree outperform cElo on this surface.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP was correct (L1未達 at 82pt). But the 6-4 6-3 scoreline shows Carabelli was dominant, not just lucky. The 82pt cElo gap may overestimate Khachanov's clay advantage. Rule improvement: clay specialists from Argentina/Spain should get a surface bonus in WTA/ATP cElo calculations.
confirmed_upsets.what_signal_could_detect: Hard court player vs clay specialist in diff range 70-100pt = effectively coin flip on clay. Market over-prices the hard court player's ranking.
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: P012: Clay specialist bonus for ATP: Argentine/Spanish clay specialists receive +15pt to effective clay cElo when L1 diff < 120pt. Reduces false confidence in hard-court-ranked players.
sources: eleco.com.ar: Camilo Ugo Carabelli dio el golpe en Barcelona y elimino a Karen Khachanov
atptour.com: Stats Centre - Carabelli vs Khachanov Barcelona 2026 R32
x.com/Probahis (PB Tennis): Carabelli 2026 clay 10-4 form data

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: CAUTION（no-bet）だった試合でアップセット発生。スクリーニング閾値・CAUTION判断の妥当性検証用。
confirmed_upsets.our_verdict: CAUTION (Bublik conf 65.5% -> R010 SKIP/no-bet。Molcan upset risk明示的にflag済)

factor_notes.UF06: Bublik's FIRST appearance at Munich (Munich debut — puntodebreak headline: 'Molcan surprises Bublik in his ATP Munich debut'). No venue familiarity. MC QF base adjustment -3% applied (within 2 weeks window). 6-4 6-2 scoreline (42 pts vs Molcan's 61) suggests actual fatigue/mental drop may warrant -5% not -3%. Bublik had just lost MC R3 vs Alcaraz 1-6 3-6 (bagel set). Mental reset in Munich R1 as 3rd seed may have been incomplete.
factor_notes.UF05: MC QF base adjustment -3% applied (within 2 weeks window). 6-4 6-2 scoreline suggests actual fatigue/mental drop may warrant -5% not -3%.
factor_notes.UFT02: Molcan noted as 'Djokovic beater' quality — dangerous clay opponent. Our system flagged this explicitly in the note. CAUTION verdict was CORRECT.

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: CAUTION判断は正しかった。Bublikへのbet推奨を出さなかったことで損失回避。ただし65.5%のconfidence算出では'upset risk有り'と明示flagできていた点は評価ポイント。MC QF後疲労補正は-3%で計算したが、6-4 6-2の大差を見ると実際の下落は-5%〜-7%程度だった可能性。
confirmed_upsets.what_signal_could_detect: 直前大会でQF以上を戦い、同週別大会に移動した選手は第1試合で疲労による性能低下が顕著。現状-3%より大きい補正（-5%）が妥当。
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: P013: ATP 500/250 seeded player who played QF+ at previous week's tournament: fatigue adjustment -5% (not -3%) for first match of next tournament within 7 days.
confirmed_upsets.note_special: CE010関連: casino dataに'Bublik vs Hurkacz'のphantom entryが存在（Hurkacz withdrew）。実際の対戦相手はMolcan。phantom entryはtier=invalidで無効化済み。

confirmed_upsets.type_note: Type A: SKIPだった試合でアップセット発生。スクリーニング閾値の妥当性検証用。

factor_notes.UFT01: Jacquemot is French (home crowd in Rouen, France). Home crowd effect can boost local players' confidence and add pressure to opponents — but Maria reeled off 8 straight games at one point.
factor_notes.UF01: Maria T. (Germany) is a clay specialist with strong European clay baseline. Despite lower cElo, her clay movement and consistency beat the younger Jacquemot.
factor_notes.UF07: WTA Official: 'Maria tops Jacquemot in Rouen for first Top 100 win of 2026' - Maria ranked OUTSIDE Top 100 beating a seeded (Top 100) player. Jacquemot was #9 seed. Maria avenged 3-set loss to Jacquemot in 2025 Guadalajara. Stats (WTA Official): Maria 63% BP conversion (5/8), 5 breaks. Total points: Maria 73 - Jacquemot 66. Veteran Maria (34, 250+ career wins) handled local-favorite pressure better than younger Jacquemot (22).

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: SKIP正しかった（L1差50pt < 80pt閾値）。ただしMariaの6-4 6-3勝利はランダムな接戦ではなく、逆転後に8ゲーム連取という実力差を示す内容。Maria（ドイツ）のクレー経験値がJacquemot（フランス）の地元アドバンテージを上回った。
confirmed_upsets.what_signal_could_detect: L1差50-80ptの『グレーゾーン』ではveteran vs young player on clay を追加分析すべき。Maria 34歳の経験値 vs Jacquemot 22歳のプレッシャーという構図は系統的に見落としやすい。
confirmed_upsets.rule_candidate: W_P_new1: WTA clay: veteran player (30+ age, 50+ career wins) vs young player (<25) in diff 40-80pt range → reduce confidence in younger player by 5%.

factor_notes.UF02: Slafkovsky hat trick (3G, OT 1:22 PP GWG). MTL young core (Suzuki 101pts career high, Slafkovsky 7pts RS vs TBL) が市場評価を上回った。
factor_notes.UFH04: PO G1 の home advantage をTBLが活かせず。TBL PDO over-index の regression 予測は外れ、むしろ MTL が期待値通りの結果に近づいた。
factor_notes.UF06: TBL veteran core の intensity 不足（PO経験あり = 序盤流す傾向）vs MTL 若手 core の aggressive approach。

confirmed_upsets.screening_decision_review: CAUTION(no bet) 正しかった（goalie確認前）。もしGO昇格していたら -1u。L1 xGF% 6.11pp差は妥当だがhome PO +7%補正とMTL PDO regression +2%合計+9%が今回はworked against us。
confirmed_upsets.what_signal_could_detect: MTL side の 'young core peaking' パターン（Suzuki career high year + Slafkovsky emergence）は cElo系統指標では反映が遅い。若手急成長パターンを PO 開始前の L2 チェックに組み込む検討。

upset_pick_candidates._renamed_note: 2026-04-18 改名: gamble_bet_candidates → upset_pick_candidates (Phase2移行・ユーザー要望)。『ギャンブル』ではなく『分析に基づく逆張り予測』の意。
upset_pick_candidates.description: 市場の本命評価に対して、アップセット兆候が十分強い場合のアンダードッグ推奨。Phase2で新規整備。
upset_pick_candidates.framework_note: GOが強い側への信頼、UPSET_PICKは弱い側に根拠があると判断した場合のアンダードッグ予測。GEN005衝突解消ルールに従い、GOとUPSET_PICKは同一試合で同時成立しない（排他）。
trigger_conditions_common: ① UF因子が3個以上重なる（upset_factorsカテゴリから独立した因子）
② 市場インプライド確率との乖離 ≥ 15pp（市場がアップセット可能性を過小評価）
③ アンダードッグのオッズ ≥ 2.50（最低限の期待値確保）
④ 推定アンダードッグ勝率 ≥ 35%（ロングショットすぎない）
⑤ EV ≥ +15%（UPSET_PICK最低EV閾値。GOの+5%より厳しい）

trigger_conditions_by_sport.tennis_atp: UF因子3個以上 ＋ cElo差50〜150pt ＋ オッズ≥2.50 ＋ 推定勝率≥35% ＋ EV≥+15% ＋ 市場乖離≥15pp
trigger_conditions_by_sport.tennis_wta: UF因子3個以上 ＋ cElo差50〜150pt ＋ オッズ≥2.50 ＋ 推定勝率≥35% ＋ EV≥+15% ＋ 市場乖離≥15pp
trigger_conditions_by_sport.nhl: UF因子3個以上 ＋ xGF%差3〜8pt ＋ オッズ≥2.50 ＋ EV≥+15% ＋ 市場乖離≥15pp
trigger_conditions_by_sport.nrl: UF因子3個以上 ＋ PD差5〜15 ＋ オッズ≥2.80 ＋ EV≥+15% ＋ 市場乖離≥15pp
trigger_conditions_by_sport.superrugby: UF因子3個以上 ＋ PD差5〜15 ＋ オッズ≥2.80 ＋ EV≥+15% ＋ 市場乖離≥15pp
trigger_conditions_by_sport.ufl: UF因子3個以上 ＋ PD差10〜25 ＋ オッズ≥3.00 ＋ EV≥+15% ＋ 市場乖離≥15pp

stake_rule.upset_pick: 1.0u (2026-04-18からstake統一。旧GAMBLE_BET時代の0.25uは過去記録のみ保持)

historical_stake_change_log.rationale_at_time: 不確実性が高いため少額運用

historical_stake_change_log.rationale: ユーザー判断に基づき「分析による逆張り予測」として通常GOと同額。的中率の追跡精度も向上（stake差による比較バイアスを排除）

factor_notes.UF01: Stuttgart = indoor clay（速め・低バウンド）。Ostapenko のフラット・攻撃的スタイルはindoor clay で特に有効。Andreeva のヘビートップスピンは低バウンドでエラー率が上がる。
factor_notes.UFT01: Ostapenko 2025 Stuttgart defending champion。大会の雰囲気・コート感覚・審判との関係性（tournament familiarity）は過小評価されがちな優位。

records.profit_note: stake 0.25u × (-1) = -0.25u。Andreeva dethrones defending champ Ostapenko 5-7 6-2 6-4 (2h22m, 第3セット 4-1 ビハインドから逆転)。
records.validation_note: 【CE014訂正 2026-04-18】元は HIT と記録していたが、一次ソース（WTA Official/Sofascore/Tennis Tonic）で Andreeva の勝利が明確。W009フレームワーク初回は不的中。UF01（indoor clay）+UFT01（defending champion）の2因子があっても現役若手の伸びと defending champion の守備転向への適応難が勝った可能性。
records.note: 通常フロー: Andreeva EV -26.4%でSKIP。GAMBLE_BET枠: Ostapenko側に全条件クリア。W009発動。stake 0.25u。結果は MISS だが、W009 発動条件自体の妥当性は継続検証中。

gamble_bet_results.ce_correction: CE014 (2026-04-18): GB001 は当初 HIT 記録だったが Andreeva 5-7 6-2 6-4 で MISS が正しい。W009/UPSET_PICK はまだ的中なし。

pattern_summary.correction_note: 4/12: U004（SF Sinner vs Zverev）を削除（Sinner HIT 実際はupset未発生）。4/18: GB001 HIT→MISS 訂正（CE014）。
pattern_summary.most_common_factor: UF01（コート表面適性）とUF03（実力差ボーダーライン）が各2件でタイ
pattern_summary.key_insight_current: Stuttgart indoor clay R1(4/13-14): Type A upset 1 confirmed (Lys/Badosa A001). CE006/CE009 corrections: Korpatsch/Shnaider/Eala/Fernandez/Samsonova/Ruzic were all data errors (correct winners won). Zhang/Noskova suspended.

notable_upsets: Sönmez(3.85) d. Paolini(4)(1.23): UF01（cElo差300ptも逆転）
Lys(3.20) d. Badosa(1.32): 2-6 7-5 6-4 (2h15m). Lys WC comeback. Badosa injury/low ranking (UF08).
stuttgart_r1_pattern_note.learning: indoor clay（Stuttgart）はcElo予測を最大300pt差でも覆す。攻撃型・フラット系が表面補正を大きく受ける。W007を強化検討。

rule_improvement_candidates.rule_pipeline_link: IMPL003 R001 (cElo 130pt CAUTION implemented 2026-04-14). P001 continues watching 100-129pt sub-zone (current 2/4).
rule_improvement_candidates.note: R001 CAUTIONゾーン導入済み。P001で細分化 evidence 継続収集中。

rule_improvement_candidates.proposed: UF02チェック追加: 若手（25歳以下）が今大会で上位シードを連続撃破中の場合はCAUTION
rule_improvement_candidates.rule_pipeline_link: Linked to P014 (R021 R1 upset winner R2 reversion) and new proposal: "Young talent consecutive-seed-defeat CAUTION flag"
rule_improvement_candidates.note: 25歳以下が大会で連続シード撃破中 = CAUTION flag。evidence 蓄積: U003 (Fonseca 19歳 Barcelona R1), A019 (Jodar 19歳 Barcelona QF)。次evidence で新 P candidate 登録検討。

rule_improvement_candidates.proposed: UFH01(バックトゥバック)・UFH02(ホットゴーリー)チェック追加
rule_improvement_candidates.evidence: データ蓄積中（結果待ち）
rule_improvement_candidates.rule_pipeline_link: N003 (B2B) / N010 (hot goalie) 既存ルール確認。新規 proposal として P018/P019 登録済。
rule_improvement_candidates.note: UFH01/UFH02 は rules_nhl.json に既定義。具体的 evidence 蓄積状況: A002/A003 (rest+motivation), A021 (young core), A027 (rivalry+fade) — NHL PO R1 全G1 結果反映済。

rule_improvement_candidates.current_rule: R001: PD差≥6pt + 信頼度75%（R1-R2のみ閾値10ptの制限あり）
rule_improvement_candidates.proposed: R011新設（崖っぷちチーム補正）: 下位4位以内・2勝以下チームへ-5%。R012新設（小サンプル補正）: R3-R8はL1閾値を6pt→12ptに引き上げ（全SKIPではなく、大差のみ通過させる）。
evidence: U005(R6 PD差17.3→MISS: Raiders 1-4背水の陣 + 5試合PDが信頼できず78%過信)
rule_improvement_candidates.implementation: rules_nrl.json v1.1 にR011・R012として追記済
rule_improvement_candidates.rule_pipeline_link: R011/R012 implemented in rules_nrl.json v1.1. Also P020 (small-sample PD unreliability) registered as continuing candidate.
rule_improvement_candidates.note: R011崖っぷち + R012 R3-R8 閾値引き上げ実装済み。P020 で R1-R8 PD信頼性ダウン補正を継続検討 (current 2/3)。

rule_improvement_candidates.title: Session_30-43 SKIP match UF factor retro
rule_improvement_candidates.method: Re-evaluate A014-A025 UF factor count + market divergence vs UPSET_PICK condition (UF>=3 AND divergence>=15pp)

findings.critical_miss: A016 Aviators vs Renegades UF4+25pp textbook case. Fav GO @1.36 MISS -1.0u. Should have been UPSET_PICK @3.0. Screening skipped UF walkthrough.

rule_proposals.title: Veteran ATP Q-round motivation crisis adjustment
rule_proposals.desc: Top100 player in Masters Qualifying R1 vs unknown: -5% motivation correction (A025 Bonzi MISS trigger)

new_procedure.after: L1-L4 fav conf then UF factor FULL WALKTHROUGH then GEN005 table match then GO/CAUTION/UPSET_PICK/SKIP. Output-A tag by separate axis (certainty >= 85%).
new_procedure.integration: From 2026-04-20 Session_45 onward, mandatory screening process

rule_improvement_candidates.rule_pipeline_link: P017 registered (ATP Q veteran motivation dip). GEN005 procedure integrated into CLAUDE.md rules_general.
rule_improvement_candidates.note: Session_45 post-hoc UF factor retro review. Three critical missed opportunities (A014/A016/A018 meeting UPSET_PICK condition in hindsight) informed GEN005 衝突解消 rule.

updated_by: Session_46 CE016 complete resolution (4 cases: A017/A022/A023/A024 all invalidated)

invalidated_upsets.upset_pick_feasibility: UF2 + 15pp - borderline. CAUTION no-bet would have been right.
invalidated_upsets.invalidation_note: NOT AN UPSET. Shelton (market fav @1.44, No.2 seed) won. Original record of "Fonseca d. Shelton" was reversed. Shelton 84% 1st-serve pts won.

why_market_favorite_won.UFA04_shelton_clay_weakness_reversed: Shelton 2026 clay season 好調 (Munich 優勝 vs Cobolli 6-2 7-5), 従来バイアス更新要
why_market_favorite_won.serve_dominance: Shelton: 76% 1st-serve pts won, 71% 2nd-serve (R16 vs Blockx; QF similar想定). Fonseca BP極少
why_market_favorite_won.fonseca_young_limitations: Fonseca 19歳・clay pattern 途上。Shelton aggressive baseline + serve combo に対応 experience 不足
why_market_favorite_won.style_matchup: Shelton 自身が Fonseca との類似性言及 - Fonseca 得意スタイルを Shelton が上回る execution で封殺
why_market_favorite_won.tournament_context: Shelton Munich 優勝: QF時点がピーク調子

deeper_factor_analysis_s46.rule_implication: R008 (Shelton clay weakness) 再評価: 2026年は clay 快進撃で旧バイアス無効化。R008 を限定化検討
deeper_factor_analysis_s46.new_rule_candidate_proposal: P023 登録: Top20サーブ型 vs 19-21歳クレー特化型 momentum 停止パターン

invalidated_upsets.invalidation_note: NOT AN UPSET. Gaubas (market fav @1.72, 22nd seed) won vs Arthur Gea (FRA unseeded). Original record of "Gea d. Gaubas" was reversed.

why_market_favorite_won.surface_specialist_edge: Gaubas (LTU) clay specialist - Madrid red clay が本人 core competency
why_market_favorite_won.seed_validation: 22nd seed in qualifying = draw 上位組。Gea unseeded → clay で実力差拡大
why_market_favorite_won.statistical_dominance: 59-45 pts (56.7% vs 43.3%), 12-6 games - 完全支配blowout
why_market_favorite_won.Gea_limitation: Arthur Gea (FRA unseeded) clay実績限定的、baseline consistency で attrition 敗北

deeper_factor_analysis_s46.rule_implication: Qualifying draw seed (22nd seed of Q) は信頼性指標として有効。L1 不明領域の Q round でも surface specialist は activation 可
deeper_factor_analysis_s46.note_for_rule_pipeline: Q seed vs Q unseed + surface specialist 3件収集で rule 化検討

uf_factors.UFA05: Svajda(US) vs Sakamoto(JPN jr) - market misprice, Svajda likely had edge

invalidated_upsets.upset_pick_feasibility: UF1 + 13pp - not met. L1=market_implied limitation example.
invalidated_upsets.rule_linked: PENDING_FACTOR_ANALYSIS (Madrid Q R1 - potential P017 veteran motivation dip)
invalidated_upsets.preliminary_finding: First search result suggested "Sakamoto d. Svajda 7-6 6-1" (Sakamoto market fav @1.59). If confirmed, NOT AN UPSET either.
invalidated_upsets.note_s46: Re-verification required. Record claims "Svajda d. Sakamoto" but first WebSearch indicated Sakamoto won. Check ATP draw page or WebFetch.

s46_research_note.preliminary_finding: 初回検索: "Rei Sakamoto defeated Svajda 7-6, 6-1" (ATP Tour draw info)
s46_research_note.second_search_inconsistency: 再検索では勝者記述取得できず
s46_research_note.suspected_error: A017/A023 と同種の CE016 系 勝敗逆転疑いあり

invalidated_upsets.invalidation_note: NOT AN UPSET. Sakamoto (market fav @1.59, WC Japan) won vs Svajda (3rd Q seed). Original record of "Svajda d. Sakamoto" was reversed. Sakamoto 6 aces, 1 DF - dominant serve.

why_market_favorite_won.WC_motivation: JPN WC 19歳 + home continent (日本) 大会でなくても若手昇進motivation高
why_market_favorite_won.svajda_Q_seed_reality: 3rd seed of Q draw = ranking #140-160 圏の player。Sakamoto #170-190圏の WC との実力差は小さく、市場がSakamoto fav @1.59 は妥当

deeper_factor_analysis_s46.rule_implication: P023 evidence に追加: 若手 WC サーブ型が Q seeded player を倒すパターン. Top20範疇ではないが、「サーブ型 若手 on clay → 本命HIT 実現」は同じ構造

uf_factors.UFA05: Virtanen(FIN ATP tour #140) vs Drogue(FRA jr unknown) - market underpriced Virtanen

invalidated_upsets.preliminary_finding: Result not retrievable from WebSearch. Opponent correction: Droguet T. (not "Drogue T."). Virtanen scheduled vs Titouan Droguet.
invalidated_upsets.note_s46: Re-verification required. Record claims "Virtanen d. Drogue" but no corroboration found.

s46_research_note.finding: WebSearch で勝者情報取得不能
s46_research_note.opponent_correction: 正確: "Titouan Droguet (FRA)" (記録の "Drogue T." は略称ミス)
recommended_verification_next_session: ATP stats centre - search by player

invalidated_upsets.invalidation_note: NOT AN UPSET. Droguet (market fav @1.72, FRA young) won vs Virtanen (FIN #140). Original record of "Virtanen d. Drogue" was reversed. 3-set match - Virtanen took 1st set 6-2, Droguet reversed with 2 sets.

why_market_favorite_won.droguet_clay_specialist: Droguet (FRA) はclay core competency、Bucharest系クレー大会で regular
why_market_favorite_won.virtanen_fast_start_fade: 1stセット 6-2 取ったが 3-setマッチ化でDroguet の clay baseline endurance が勝る pattern
why_market_favorite_won.market_price_validity: fav @1.72 = 58.1% implied は clay specialist 側に妥当

deeper_factor_analysis_s46.rule_implication: young FRA clay specialist が 3-set で hard-court oriented FIN player を attrition で破る pattern. clay specialization の endurance 側面が evidence
deeper_factor_analysis_s46.supporting_note: P012 (clay specialist vs hardcourt player) の候補 evidence としても扱える (Carabelli vs Khachanov と類似 motif)
